title: Creamy Moroccan Tofu Tagine
description: A rich, light, and lazy-sunday Moroccan dish featuring marinated tofu simmered in a fragrant tomato sauce and finished with a silky cashewcoconut cream.

ingredients.name: spice mix
ingredients.notes: turmeric, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, ginger, salt

ingredients.name: cashew cream
ingredients.notes: blend cashews with water until smooth

instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture and cut into 2cm cubes.
In a bowl, combine tofu with the spice mix and olive oil; let marinate for 15 minutes.
Place the pressure cooker on medium heat, sauté the tofu until golden on all sides.
Add the chopped tomatoes, zucchini, bell pepper, and chickpeas; stir for 2 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk, cashew cream, and vegetable broth; stir to combine.
Seal the cooker and cook at high pressure for 5 minutes.
Quick‑release the pressure, stir the tagine, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro, alongside couscous or warm flatbread.
